description_long: This is an ornate chandelier with six evenly spaced cylindrical glass shades arranged in a circular pattern around a central decorative stem. The arms supporting the shades are intricately curved and adorned with ornamental flourishes, giving the fixture a classic, elegant appearance. The central stem features detailed sculptural elements and is suspended from a chain and ceiling mount, suggesting a fixed installation. Each glass shade appears to be frosted or etched with subtle patterns, diffusing the light and adding to the lamp's decorative appeal. The overall structure is predominantly metallic, likely finished in a light or white color to complement the glass. This chandelier is designed to be a statement piece, suitable for upscale urban interiors or public spaces.
description: An ornate, six-shade chandelier with frosted glass and decorative metalwork, suspended from a chain. The design is elegant and classic, featuring intricate arms and sculpted details.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six glass shades and the ornate central stem with decorative arms radiating outward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the circular arrangement of the shades and the symmetry of the curved arms.
description_view_2: Another front view, similar to view 0, displaying the full set of shades and the detailed central structure.
description_view_3: Side view mirroring view 1, emphasizing the even spacing of the shades and the elegant arm design.
